name: Lawrence, Paul R
title: Deputy Secretary

transactions.description: Fidelity Software and IT Services Portfolio (FSCSX)
T Rowe Price Health Sciences Fund, Inc Class I Shares (THISX)

summary: Lawrence reported 3 sales totaling an estimated $96K, consistent with ethics agreement divestitures. Notable: Dominion Energy sale is relevant given VA's large energy footprint. Filer received a 30-day filing extension. Confirmed to second Trump-term role as Deputy Secretary of VA after previously serving as Under Secretary for Benefits (2018-2021).
